sources.notes: FDSNWS earthquake event query bounded to the Albania bbox (highly active — cf. the 2019 Durrës M6.4 earthquake). Returns recent events with magnitude, depth, time, location. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json.

Open-Meteo Flood API exposing GloFAS ensemble river-discharge forecasts, sampled near Tirana / the Ishëm–Erzen basin. Keyless flood-risk signal for Albania's flood-prone lowlands. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: EFFIS — European Forest Fire Information System (Copernicus / JRC)
sources.notes: EFFIS OGC WMS covering pan-European fire danger, active fires and burnt areas — includes Albania, which sees significant summer wildfire activity. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/vnd.ogc.wms_xml (OGC XML).

Energy-Charts public API exposing Albanian electricity day-ahead prices and market data (CC BY 4.0). No API key required. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json (rate-limited; retry on HTTP 429).
Open-Meteo air-quality API (CAMS) sampled at Tirana: PM10, PM2.5 and European AQI. Keyless ambient air-pollution signal for Albania. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

Open-Meteo Marine API sampled off Durrës on the Albanian Adriatic coast: significant wave height, direction and period. Keyless marine/coastal hazard signal. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.

sources.authority: GDACS — Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System (UN/EC)
sources.notes: GDACS multi-hazard event list (floods, earthquakes, wildfires) as GeoJSON; used as the primary alerting feed since Albania is not a Meteoalarm member. Filter by country in feature properties. Confirmed HTTP 200, content-type application/json; charset=utf-8.
